ModConfigMenu.IsEnableQuickStack.Name: ¿Activar apilado rápido?
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableQuickStack.Desc: Si está activado, adds a \"Apilado rápido To Nearby Chests\" button to your Inventario menu. Presionaing this button will stack items from your Inventario to any nearby chests which contain that item.
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableQuickStackHotkey.D: Si está activado, Presionaing either of the Apilado rápido Atajo de teclados specified below will Apilado rápido your items, even outside of your Inventario menu.
ModConfigMenu.QuickStackKeyboardHotkey.D: Presiona esta tecla to Apilado rápido your items.
ModConfigMenu.QuickStackControllerHotkey: Presiona este botón to Apilado rápido your items.
ModConfigMenu.QuickStackRange.Name: Range
ModConfigMenu.QuickStackRange.Desc: How many tiles away from the player to search for nearby chests.\n\nIf set to \"Ubicación\", all chests in the player's current Ubicación will be considered.
ModConfigMenu.QuickStackRange.Desc-Globa: \n\nIf set to \"Global\", all chests in the world will be considered.
ModConfigMenu.QuickStackRange.ChestsAnyw: QuickStackRange config value was \"Global\" but has been reset to \"Ubicación\". \"Global\" is only supported if the Chests Anywhere mod is installed.
Si está activado, Apilado rápido will place as many items as possible into chests which contain that item, rather than just a single stack.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackIgnoreItemQual: (Requires \"Overflow items?\" to be Activado.)\nSi está activado, Apilado rápido will place items into chests which contain\nANY quality of that same item.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackIgnoreItemColo: (Requires \"Overflow items?\" to be Activado.)\nSi está activado, Apilado rápido will place items into chests which contain\nANY color variation of that same item (e.g. colored flowers).
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackIgnoreItemName: (Requires \"Overflow items?\" to be Activado.)\nSi está activado, Apilado rápido will place items into chests which contain\nANY name variation of that same item (e.g. flavored honey).
ModConfigMenu.QuickStackNonStackableType:
(Requires "Overflow items?" to be Activado.)
Elegir which non-stackable item types can be Apilado rápidoed as
overflow items if a chest contains that same item.

Elegir "None" if non-stackable items should NOT be Apilado rápidoed.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackAllowHotkeyInC: Allow Atajo de teclado in chest menu?

(Requires \"Activar Atajo de teclado?\" to be Activado.)\nSi está activado, allows the Apilado rápido Atajo de teclado to work within chest menus,\nin which case items will be Apilado rápidoed into that specific chest.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackWithFillStacks: Apilado rápido with Add To Stacks?
Si está activado, the \"Add To Existing Stacks\" button in chest menus will now\nbe a \"Apilado rápido Items\" button which will Apilado rápido items into that\nspecific chest when Presionaed.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackVisuallyOverri: Apilado rápido icon for Add To Stacks?
(Requires \"Apilado rápido with Add To Stacks?\" to be Activado.)\nSi está activado, the \"Apilado rápido Items\" button in chest menus will be\nvisually overridden to use a slightly different icon.
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableQuickStackToggleCh: Si está activado, adds a Toggle Apilado rápido button to chest menus to determine whether that specific chest will be considered when Apilado rápidoing.
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableQuickStackPrioriti: (Requires \"Toggle Apilado rápido per-chest?\" to be Activado.)\nSi está activado, the Toggle Apilado rápido button can also assign a priority level for that specific chest.\nChests with a higher priority level will be considered first when Apilado rápidoing.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackToggleChestBut: (Requires \"Toggle Apilado rápido per-chest?\" to be Activado.)\nSi está activado, the Toggle Apilado rápido button will be hidden from chest menus.\nEven when hidden, a chest's toggle/prioritize Apilado rápido setting will still be used.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackIntoMills.Name: Into Mills?
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackIntoMills.Desc: Si está activado, nearby mills will be considered when Apilado rápidoing.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackIntoJunimoHuts: Si está activado, nearby Junimo Huts will be considered when Apilado rápidoing.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackIntoDressers.D: (Requires \"Overflow items?\" to be Activado.)\nSi está activado, nearby dressers will be considered when Apilado rápidoing.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackIntoHoppers.De: Si está activado, nearby hoppers will be considered when Apilado rápidoing.
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackIntoMiniShippi: Si está activado, nearby Mini-Shipping Bins will be considered when Apilado rápidoing.
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableQuickStackAnimatio: Si está activado, an animation will play when items are Apilado rápidoed to visually Mostrar where each item was stored.
ModConfigMenu.QuickStackAnimationItemSpe:
For Apilado rápido animation:
Adjusts the speed at which Apilado rápidoed items move toward their stored chest.

0.5x: Half speed
1x: Normal speed
3x: Triple speed
ModConfigMenu.QuickStackAnimationStackSp:
For Apilado rápido animation:
Adjusts the speed at which items are individually stacked into their stored chest.

0.5x: Half speed
1x: Normal speed
3x: Triple speed
ModConfigMenu.IsQuickStackTooltipDrawNea: Mostrar nearby chests in Texto emergente?
Si está activado, hovering over the Apilado rápido button will Mostrar a preview of all nearby chests considered for Apilado rápido, ordered by distance.
ModConfigMenu.IsSuppressSoundWhenNoNearb: Si está activado, Presionaing the Apilado rápido button or Atajo de teclado will only play its sound effect when there are nearby chests.
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableFavoriteItems.Name: ¿Activar objetos favoritos?
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableFavoriteItems.Desc: Si está activado, items in your Inventario can be favorited. Favorited items will be ignored when stacking into chests. They will also be prevented from being trashed, dropped, and shipped.
ModConfigMenu.FavoriteItemsKeyboardHotke: Hold this key when selecting an item to favorite it.
ModConfigMenu.FavoriteItemsControllerHot: Hold this button when selecting an item to favorite it.
ModConfigMenu.FavoriteItemsHighlightText: Elegir your preferred texture style for highlighting favorited items in your Inventario.
ModConfigMenu.IsFavoriteItemsUseCustomHi: Si está activado, applies a custom color to the highlight style.
ModConfigMenu.FavoriteItemsCustomHighlig: (Requires \"Use Custom Highlight Color?\" to be Activado.)\nRed component of the custom highlight color.
(Requires \"Use Custom Highlight Color?\" to be Activado.)\nGreen component of the custom highlight color.
(Requires \"Use Custom Highlight Color?\" to be Activado.)\nBlue component of the custom highlight color.
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableTakeAllButOne.Name: Activar take all but one?
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableTakeAllButOne.Desc: Si está activado, while holding the keybind below, instantly take all but one item from the selected item stack, rather than taking a single item at a time.
ModConfigMenu.TakeAllButOneKeyboardHotke: Hold this key when taking an item from an item stack to instantly take all but one of that item.
ModConfigMenu.TakeAllButOneControllerHot: Hold this button when taking an item from an item stack to instantly take all but one of that item.
Si está activado, right-Haz clicing a chest menu's organize button (or Presionaing (X) on gamepad) will toggle Auto Organize ON/OFF for that chest. When a chest has Auto Organize ON, all of its items will remain organized, even when new items are added.
ModConfigMenu.IsShowAutoOrganizeButtonIn: Si está activado, the hover text for the Auto Organize button will include an additional line explaining how to toggle off Auto Organize.
ModConfigMenu.IsEnableInventoryPageSideW: Si está activado, moving your controller's cursor beyond either side of your Inventario menu will warp the cursor to the opposite side.
